title: SosResource does not validate timestamp type
description:
File: python/src/lichen/coap/resources.py:435-456

The render_put method extracts 't' from CBOR payload but does not validate it is numeric:
```python
t = body.get('t')
...
self.activate(eui64, t if t is not None else 0.0)
```

If a malicious client sends {'t': 'not-a-number'}, the string is stored as self._t and later serialized via _state_payload(). This violates the API contract (t: float) and could cause type errors in consumers expecting numeric timestamps.

Fix: Add type validation before calling activate:
```python
if t is not None and not isinstance(t, (int, float)):
    return Message(code=aiocoap.BAD_REQUEST)
```
